notes: Municipal water AND sewer available. Min lot area from LUB applies. No on-site systems needed.
Municipal water only. Requires on-site septic. Must meet NS On-Site Sewage Disposal Regulations.
No municipal services. Requires on-site well + septic. 50% reserve for septic replacement field. Minimum 0.37ha (3700sqm) per NS regulations.
Unserviced with bedrock constraints. Larger lot to accommodate raised septic fields and well isolation. Minimum 0.46ha.
Variance possible for unserviced lots in specific communities. Requires NS Environment approval + development agreement.
